summary: Forge Industries (VP of IT Gerald Hutchins and Security Manager Dana Moretti) contacted support to inquire about early access to Comply v2, driven by the need for multi-framework compliance reporting across SOC 2, HIPAA, and PCI DSS. Senior support engineer Elena Vasquez and CSM David Kim informed them that Comply v2 is already in final QA and will GA on April 7th — just four days away — covering all three of their required frameworks plus ISO 27001. The team discussed automatic tenant upgrades, a migration assistant for control mapping, inline evidence collection, and an upcoming customer webinar on April 10th. Dana also raised a feature request around custom control labeling with internal policy numbers, which Elena agreed to investigate and formally log with the product team.
actionItems: David Kim: Send Forge Industries team the April 10th v2 customer webinar invite, including Dana's two compliance analysts
Dana Moretti: Email David Kim with compliance analysts' contact details to be added to webinar invite
Elena Vasquez: Follow up in writing with specifics on custom control labeling and metadata field support in Comply v2
Elena Vasquez: Log custom internal policy cross-referencing as a formal feature request with the product team and flag Forge Industries as a reference customer candidate

keyMoments.text: Elena reveals Comply v2 GA launch is only four days away on April 7th, far sooner than the customer expected
keyMoments.speaker: Elena Vasquez

keyMoments.text: Dana discloses Forge was considering a separate point solution for HIPAA, signaling potential churn risk that v2 now resolves
keyMoments.speaker: Dana Moretti

keyMoments.text: David highlights inline evidence collection in v2, which Dana confirms would save her team significant manual audit prep hours
keyMoments.speaker: David Kim

keyMoments.text: Dana requests custom control labeling with internal policy numbers; Elena flags this as a potential feature gap and commits to investigating and logging a formal product request
keyMoments.speaker: Dana Moretti
